title: Bitcoin (BTC) News: Why BlackRock Sold $1 Billion in Bitcoin
description: One number set crypto X/Twitter on edge over the weekend. title: BlackRock IBIT Sheds $1 Billion in Bitcoin as Larry Fink Quote Misleads Traders
description: BlackRock's IBIT sold $1.01B Bitcoin via redemptions as Larry Fink's old crypto comments resurfaced. BTC held near $77,382.

title: The Fastest-Growing ETF in History Is Riding the Supercharged AI Memory Boom
description: Artificial intelligence is turning the semiconductor industry upside down. For years, memory chips were treated like a commodity business — boom during shortages, bust during gluts, rinse and repeat. But AI may be rewriting the rules.
